# Viscometer Sag Test

**Summary**: A dynamic measurement of the density difference in drilling fluid after being subjected to shear.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2018-basfar|BASFAR, 2018]] applied viscometer sag shoe tests (VSST) to evaluate dynamic sag tendencies.
